description: You are a librarian configuring a public Tor Browser research kiosk. Customize the Tor Browser interface and settings for a public, multi-user environment. Create a directory at /home/ga/Desktop/LabDownloads/ and set it as the default download location, ensuring the browser is configured to always ask where to save files. Set the homepage and new windows to the custom URL https://ssd.eff.org/. Modify the toolbar by removing the 'New Identity' button and adding the 'Zoom Controls' and 'Print' buttons. Leave the browser running once the configuration is complete.
